description_long: This is a single bed with a rustic, weathered wooden frame, featuring a slatted headboard and a matching, simpler footboard. The surface of the bed is flat and appears to be made of the same aged wood as the frame, with a mottled, distressed finish that gives it a rugged, utilitarian look. The bed lacks a visible mattress or any bedding, exposing the hard, textured wooden platform. The headboard is composed of vertical slats, while the footboard is a solid horizontal bar, both integrated into the frame. The legs are sturdy and rectangular, providing stable support. This bed would be suitable for outdoor or semi-sheltered urban environments, such as parks, shelters, or communal spaces.
description: A rustic, weathered wooden bed with a slatted headboard and a flat, bare platform. The frame is sturdy and utilitarian, with a distressed finish and no visible mattress.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, with both the slatted headboard and the simpler footboard visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the footboard's solid horizontal bar and the flat, bare sleeping surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the slatted headboard and footboard visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the slatted headboard and the length of the bed platform.
